src: 🤖 The wrapper for the Telegram Bot API written in Swift. It's not a framework. There is no special syntax here. This is a library that implements all Telegram Bot API methods, which is available to you to work with Vapor, Smoke, Hummingbird, FlyingFox. https://core.telegram.org/bots/api
ja: Vapor、Smoke、Hummingbird、FlyingFoxで利用可能な、SwiftでTelegram Bot APIのすべてのメソッドを実装したライブラリ（フレームワークではなく、特別な構文もない）。https://core.telegram.org/bots/api
